seoTitle: Lowlands vs Lumeah — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lowlands and Lumeah. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lowlands and Lumeah.
heading: Lowlands vs Lumeah — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lowlands, Western Australia and Lumeah, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lumeah has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Lowlands (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lowlands or Lumeah safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lowlands has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Lumeah scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lowlands scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Lumeah scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lowlands or Lumeah?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lumeah has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
